zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Betts於1508年1月11日出生在英國素福爾可沃薩姆時，他的父親John Betts28歲，母親Mary Wright26歲。他於1544年7月27日與Jane Godfrey在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1575年在英國肯特比阿斯特德享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Betts于1508年1月11日出生在英国素福爾可沃薩姆时，他的父亲John Betts28岁，母亲Mary Wright26岁。他于1544年7月27日与Jane Godfrey在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1575年在英国肯特比阿斯特德享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Betts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bett , with excrescent -s, a patronymic or metronymic from the medieval personal name Bett, a short form of Bartholomew, Beatrice, or Elizabeth.

variants.name: Bettis
meanings: English: variant of Betts (see also Bett ), or possibly a topographic name meaning ‘(dweller) by the hollows’, from Old English bytt ‘butt, cask, flagon, womb’, used topographically like Old English byden ‘butt’ (compare Bidwell ).

variants.name: Bett
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Bett(e). When feminine it was usually a pet form of Beatrice but possibly also Elizabeth. When masculine it was a pet form of Bertram or Bertelmew (see Bartholomew ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Betts was born on 11 January 1508, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Betts, was 28 and his mother, Mary Wright, was 26. He married Jane Godfrey on 27 July 1544, in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1575, in Bearsted, Kent, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Botolph Without Aldgate, London, Engl: Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Betts est né le 11 janvier 1508, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Betts, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Wright, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane Godfrey le 27 juillet 1544, à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1575, à Bearsted, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Botolph Without Aldgate, London, Engl: Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Betts am 11. Januar 1508 in Wortham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Betts 28 und seine Mutter Mary Wright 26. Er hat am 27. Juli 1544 in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England Jane Godfrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1575 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bearsted, Kent, England und wurde in Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Betts è nato il il 11 gennaio 1508 nel Wortham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Betts, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary Wright, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane Godfrey il 27 luglio 1544, nel St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1575, nel Bearsted, Kent, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bettsが1508年1月11日にイギリススフォルクウオルサムで生まれた時，父John Bettsは28歳，母Mary Wrightは26歳であった。1544年7月27日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットでJane Godfreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1575年にイギリスケントビールステドで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ ウィソウト アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.St Botolph Without Aldgate, London, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Betts(이)가 1508년 1월 11일 영국 수폴크 워섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Betts(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Wright(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1544년 7월 27일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에서 Jane Godfrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1575년 영국 켄트 브이르스테드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Betts nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1508, em Wortham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Betts, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Wright, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Godfrey em 27 de julho de 1544, em St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1575, em Bearsted, Kent, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Botolph Without Aldgate, London, Engl: сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Betts родился 11 января 1508 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Betts было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Wright, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Godfrey 27 июля 1544 г. в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1575 г. в местности бирстед, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
